inflation_definition: Bitcoin ili ndi kuchuluka kokhazikika kwa ndalama 21 miliyoni zomwe sizingawonjezedwe. Mosiyana ndi ndalama za boma, palibe amene angasindikize Bitcoin zambiri. Sankhani ndalama zanu pansipa kuti muphunzire momwe kukwera kwa mitengo kukukukhudzani ndi momwe Bitcoin ingathandize.
inflation_description: Bitcoin ili ndi kuchuluka kokhazikika kwa Bitcoin 21 miliyoni yomwe idzakhaleko. Palibe amene angasindikize Bitcoin zambiri ndi kupangitsa kukwera kwa mitengo.
inflation_sticker_cure: MUKUFUNA MANKHWALA A KUKWERA KWA MITENGO?
inflation_sticker_what_if: BWANJI NDALAMA ZANU ZIKANAKHALA ZOPANDA KUKWERA KWA MITENGO?
inflation_usd_s1_c1: Ngati munayika $100 ku banki zaka 5 zapitazo, muli ndi mphamvu yogulira yochepa kuposa $100 lero.
inflation_usd_s1_c4: Mwina mukadali ndi $100 mu akaunti yanu ya ku banki, koma imakugulitsani zochepa kuposa kale.
inflation_usd_s1_c5: Ku United States, palibe malire okhazikika pa kuchuluka kwa Madola a US omwe angapangidwe. Kuchuluka kosatha uku ndiko kumachititsa kukwera kwa mitengo.
inflation_usd_s1_c7: kuchuluka kwa Madola a US kwakwera kuchokera pa $4 trillion mpaka $18 trillion.
inflation_usd_s1_c8: Kusindikiza ndalama uku kwapangitsa kukwera kwa mitengo kwakukulu.
inflation_usd_s1_c9: Zinthu zonse zimadula kwambiri tsopano, chifukwa kusindikiza ndalama kwapangitsa madola anu kukhala ochepa mtengo.
inflation_intro_c1: Kukwera kwa mitengo kumachitika ndalama zambiri zikasindikizidwa kapena kupangidwa kuchokera paliponse. Izi zimapangitsa ndalama zanu kukhala zochepa mtengo nthawi ikupita.
inflation_intro_c2: Pamene ndalama zambiri zimapangidwa kudzera mu zothandiza za bajeti ndi malamulo atsopano a kugwiritsa ntchito ndalama, ndalama zomwe muli nazo zimagulitsani zochepa pamene nthawi ikupita. Chifukwa ndalama zambiri zinasindikizidwa m'zaka zingapo zapitazo, mtengo wa ndalama mu akaunti yanu ya ku banki ndi m'thumba mwanu wachepa kwambiri nthawi yapitayo.
inflation_intro_c3: Ndi Bitcoin, pali malire okhazikika a Bitcoin 21 miliyoni yomwe idzakhaleko. Chifukwa Bitcoin zambiri sizingapangidwe, mtengo wawo wakwera kwambiri nthawi yapitayo.
inflation_intro_usd: Ku United States, palibe malire okhazikika pa kuchuluka kwa madola omwe angapangidwe.
inflation_intro_cad: Ku Canada, palibe malire okhazikika pa kuchuluka kwa Madola a Canada omwe angapangidwe.
inflation_intro_euro: Ku Eurozone, palibe malire okhazikika pa kuchuluka kwa Ma Euro omwe angapangidwe.
inflation_intro_gbp: Ku United Kingdom, palibe malire okhazikika pa kuchuluka kwa Ma Paundi a Britain omwe angapangidwe.
inflation_intro_brazilian_real: Ku Brazil, palibe malire okhazikika pa kuchuluka kwa Ma Real a Brazil omwe angapangidwe.
inflation_intro_philippine_peso: Ku Philippines, palibe malire okhazikika pa kuchuluka kwa Ma Peso a Philippines omwe angapangidwe.
inflation_intro_mexican_peso: Ku Mexico, palibe malire okhazikika pa kuchuluka kwa Ma Peso a Mexico omwe angapangidwe.
inflation_intro_indian_rupee: Ku India, palibe malire okhazikika pa kuchuluka kwa Ma Rupee a India omwe angapangidwe.
inflation_intro_honduran_lempira: Ku Honduras, palibe malire okhazikika pa kuchuluka kwa Ma Lempira a Honduras omwe angapangidwe.
inflation_intro_venezuelan_bolivar: Ku Venezuela, palibe malire okhazikika pa kuchuluka kwa Ma Bolivar a Venezuela omwe angapangidwe.
inflation_intro_japanese_yen: Ku Japan, palibe malire okhazikika pa kuchuluka kwa Ma Yen a Japan omwe angapangidwe.
inflation_intro_australian_dollar: Ku Australia, palibe malire okhazikika pa kuchuluka kwa Madola a Australia omwe angapangidwe.
inflation_intro_israeli_shekel: Ku Israel, palibe malire okhazikika pa kuchuluka kwa Ma Shekel a Israel omwe angapangidwe.
inflation_intro_thai_baht: Ku Thailand, palibe malire okhazikika pa kuchuluka kwa Ma Baht a Thailand omwe angapangidwe.
inflation_intro_nz_dollar: Ku New Zealand, palibe malire okhazikika pa kuchuluka kwa Madola a New Zealand omwe angapangidwe.
inflation_cause_c1: Ngakhale maukonde otumiza katundu ndi makampani ena amathandizira kukweza mitengo mwachinyengo, choyambitsa chenicheni cha kukwera kwa mitengo ndi kuwonjezeka kwa kuchuluka kwa ndalama.
inflation_cause_c2: Uku kunali kuwonjezeka kwakukulu kwa kuchuluka kwa ndalama ndipo sizidzakhala komaliza.
inflation_cause_c3: Ndalama zambiri zikapangidwa kuchokera paliponse, mtengo wa chilichonse mu ndalama zimenezo umakwera. Izi zimaphatikiza mitengo ya zinthu zoyambirira zomwe makampani amayenera kulipira pa katundu wawo, kutanthauza mitengo yokwera kwa inu.
inflation_cause_c4: Kukwera kwa mitengo si kukwera kwa mitengo yokha. Kukwera kwa mitengo ndi pamene ndalama zanu zimakhala zochepa mtengo nthawi ikupita.
inflation_cause_usd: Pafupifupi 80% ya Madola onse a US omwe alipo lero anapangidwa pakati pa 2020 ndi 2023.
inflation_cause_cad: Kupitirira 1 mwa Madola 5 a Canada omwe alipo lero anapangidwa pakati pa 2020 ndi 2022.
inflation_cause_euro: Pafupifupi 1 mwa Ma Euro 4 omwe alipo lero anapangidwa pakati pa 2020 ndi 2022.
inflation_cause_gbp: Pafupifupi 1 mwa Ma Paundi 4 a Britain omwe alipo lero anapangidwa pakati pa 2020 ndi 2022.
inflation_cause_brazilian_real: Pafupifupi 40% ya Ma Real onse a Brazil omwe alipo lero anapangidwa pakati pa 2020 ndi 2022.
inflation_cause_philippine_peso: Pafupifupi 50% ya Ma Peso onse a Philippines omwe alipo lero anapangidwa pakati pa 2020 ndi 2022.
inflation_cause_mexican_peso: Kupitirira 50% ya Ma Peso onse a Mexico omwe alipo lero anapangidwa pakati pa 2016 ndi 2022.
inflation_cause_indian_rupee: Kupitirira 50% ya Ma Rupee onse a India omwe alipo lero anapangidwa pakati pa 2016 ndi 2022.
inflation_cause_honduran_lempira: Kupitirira 50% ya Ma Lempira onse a Honduras omwe alipo lero anapangidwa pakati pa 2016 ndi 2022.
inflation_cause_venezuelan_bolivar: Kupitirira 80% ya Ma Bolivar onse a Venezuela omwe alipo lero anapangidwa chaka chapitachi!
inflation_cause_japanese_yen: Kupitirira 25% ya Ma Yen onse a Japan omwe alipo lero anapangidwa pakati pa 2016 ndi 2022.
inflation_cause_australian_dollar: Kupitirira 50% ya Madola onse a Australia omwe alipo lero anapangidwa pakati pa 2016 ndi 2022.
inflation_cause_israeli_shekel: Pafupifupi 50% ya Ma Shekel onse a Israel omwe alipo lero anapangidwa pakati pa 2016 ndi 2023.
inflation_cause_thai_baht: Pafupifupi 35% ya Ma Baht onse a Thailand omwe alipo lero anapangidwa pakati pa 2016 ndi 2023.
inflation_cause_nz_dollar: Pafupifupi 50% ya Madola onse a New Zealand omwe alipo lero anapangidwa pakati pa 2010 ndi 2023.
inflation_issuance_header: KODI BITCOIN ILI NDI KUKWERA KWA MITENGO?
inflation_issuance_c1: Kukwera kwa mitengo ndi kunenera kuti gawo lanu la keiki ya ndalama likuchepa chaka chilichonse. Ndiye kodi Bitcoin ili ndi kukwera kwa mitengo?
inflation_issuance_c2: Bitcoin ili ndi kuchuluka kokhazikika kwa 21,000,000 (21 miliyoni) bitcoin yomwe idzakhaleko. Malire a kuchuluka a 21 miliyoni ali mu khodi ndipo amatetezedwa ndi netiweki ya makompyuta yamphamvu kwambiri padziko lonse, yotchedwa Netiweki ya Bitcoin. Malire awa sangasinthidwe.
inflation_issuance_c3: Ngakhale Bitcoin ilibe kukwera kwa mitengo, ili ndi kutulutsa. Kutulutsa ndi chiwerengero cha Bitcoin yatsopano yofukulidwa chaka chilichonse. Ofukula Bitcoin amateteza netiwekiyo, kuyang'anira machitidwe a Bitcoin, ndi kulipidwa pa ntchito yawo. Ofukula Bitcoin amalipidwa ndi kutulutsa kwatsopano (mpaka kuthera) ndiponso malipiro a machitidwe.
inflation_issuance_c4: Kupitirira 95% ya bitcoin yonse yafukulidwa kale. Kupitirira 99% ya bitcoin yonse ya 21 miliyoni idzakhala itafukulidwa pofika chaka cha 2035, ndipo yotsala yochepa kuposa 1% idzafukulidwa pofika chaka cha 2140.
inflation_issuance_c5: Ngakhale kutulutsa kunalipo mpaka kuchuluka kokhazikika kwa bitcoin 21 miliyoni, cholinga chonse ndi chakuti gawo lanu la keiki ya bitcoin 21 miliyoni silichepa. Izi zimasiyana kwambiri ndi ndalama za boma zomwe timagwiritsa ntchito. Mu maukonde amenewo, gawo lanu la keiki limachepa chaka chilichonse ndalama zambiri zikasindikizidwa kuchokera paliponse.
inflation_protect_header: KODI BITCOIN INGALETEZE NDALAMA ZANGA KU KUKWERA KWA MITENGO?
inflation_protect_c1: Bitcoin m'mbiri yake yakhala yabwino kwambiri potezera anthu ku kukwera kwa mitengo kwa ndalama zakomweko. Anthu ambiri omwe amagwiritsa ntchito Bitcoin ngati chitetezo cha kukwera kwa mitengo amasunga ndalama zomwe angathe kusunga ngati Bitcoin kwa zaka zambiri.
inflation_protect_c2: Kuchuluka kokhazikika kwa Bitcoin kumapangitsa njira yabwino kwambiri yosungira ndalama zanu kwa nthawi yaitali.
inflation_protect_c3: Mukasunga mu Bitcoin, zinthu zonse zimaoneka zotsika mtengo pa nthawi yaitali. Mukasunga mu ndalama za boma zomwe angathe kusindikiza kwaulere, zinthu zonse zimaoneka zodula.
inflation_protect_usd: Madola a US atayirira 90% ya mphamvu yawo yogulira kuyambira 1950 pamene andale anasindikiza ambiri.
inflation_protect_cad: Madola a Canada atayirira kupitirira 90% ya mphamvu yawo yogulira kuyambira 1971 pamene andale anasindikiza ambiri.
inflation_protect_euro: Ma Euro atayirira kupitirira 30% ya mphamvu yawo yogulira kuyambira kupangidwa kwawo mu 1999 pamene andale anasindikiza ambiri.
inflation_protect_gbp: Ma Paundi a Britain atayirira 90% ya mphamvu yawo yogulira kuyambira 1950 pamene andale anasindikiza ambiri.
inflation_protect_brazilian_real: Kuchuluka kwa ndalama za Real ya Brazil kwakwera kuchokera pa R$427 biliyoni mpaka R$589 biliyoni mu zaka 2 zokha pamene andale anasindikiza ambiri.
inflation_protect_brazilian_real_2: Mu 2020, boma la Brazil linasindikiza noti yatsopano ya R$200. Noti imodzi iyi inali yofanana ndi 12.8% ya ma reais onse omwe anasindikizidwa chaka chimenecho!
inflation_protect_philippine_peso: Kuchuluka kwa ndalama za Peso ya Philippines kwakwirikira kubwerekera kuyambira 2020 pamene andale anasindikiza ambiri.
inflation_protect_mexican_peso: Kuchuluka kwa ndalama za Peso ya Mexico kwakwirikira kubwerekera kuyambira 2016 pamene andale anasindikiza ambiri.
inflation_protect_indian_rupee: Kuchuluka kwa ndalama za Rupee ya India kwakwirikira kubwerekera kuyambira 2016 pamene andale anasindikiza ambiri.
inflation_protect_honduran_lempira: Kuchuluka kwa ndalama za Lempira ya Honduras kwakwirikira kubwerekera kuyambira 2016 pamene andale anasindikiza ambiri.
inflation_protect_venezuelan_bolivar: Kuchuluka kwa ndalama za Bolivar ya Venezuela kwakwera kupitirira 500% chaka chapitachi pamene andale anasindikiza ambiri.
inflation_protect_japanese_yen: Kuchuluka kwa ndalama za Yen ya Japan kwakwera kupitirira 33% kuyambira 2016 pamene andale anasindikiza ambiri.
inflation_protect_australian_dollar: Kuchuluka kwa ndalama za Dola ya Australia kwakwera kupitirira 100% kuyambira 2016 pamene andale anasindikiza ambiri.
inflation_protect_israeli_shekel: Kuchuluka kwa ndalama za Shekel ya Israel kwakwera pafupifupi 100% kuyambira 2016 pamene andale anasindikiza ambiri.
inflation_protect_thai_baht: Kuchuluka kwa ndalama za Baht ya Thailand kwakwera pafupifupi 50% kuyambira 2016 pamene andale anasindikiza ambiri.
inflation_protect_nz_dollar: Kuchuluka kwa ndalama za Dola ya New Zealand kwakwera pafupifupi 100% kuyambira 2010 pamene andale anasindikiza ambiri.
inflation_graphic_money_up: Pamene kuchuluka kwa ndalama zosindikizidwa kukwera...
